# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: service-a-allow-from-service-b
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: service-a
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: service-b-mtls
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: service-b-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - service-b.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: service-b-allow-from-service-a
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: service-b
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: service-a-mtls
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: service-a-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - service-a.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
